name: Substance Use Focus Group
instructions:
This discussion aims to explore personal experiences, barriers to reduction, and the impact of substance use on daily life. We have sample questions that we will be using to train the AI to ask patients. We would love your feedback about these questions.

Please use this list of questions (a-e) to guide your response to each of the following categories of patient-facing questions (1-4). 

a. Are there any questions that should be worded differently?
b. Are there missing questions?
c. What would you like to know from the questions for your clinical practice?
d. Are there unnecessary questions?
e. What are we missing?
